2603.24440.title: CUA-Suite: Massive Human-annotated Video Demonstrations for Computer-Use Agents
2603.24440.paper_summary: Computer-use agents (CUAs) hold great promise for automating complex desktop workflows, yet progress toward general-purpose agents is bottlenecked by the scarcity of continuous, high-quality human demonstration videos. Recent work emphasizes that continuous video, not sparse screenshots, is the critical missing ingredient for scaling these agents. However, the largest existing open dataset, ScaleCUA, contains only 2 million screenshots, equating to less than 20 hours of video. To address this bottleneck, we introduce CUA-Suite, a large-scale ecosystem of expert video demonstrations and dense annotations for professional desktop computer-use agents. At its core is VideoCUA, which provides approximately 10,000 human-demonstrated tasks across 87 diverse applications with continuous 30 fps screen recordings, kinematic cursor traces, and multi-layerfed reasoning annotations, totaling approximately 55 hours and 6 million frames of expert video. Unlike sparse datasets that capture only final click coordinates, these continuous video streams preserve the full temporal dynamics of human interaction, forming a superset of information that can be losslessly transformed into the formats required by existing agent frameworks. CUA-Suite further provides two complementary resources: UI-Vision, a rigorous benchmark for evaluating grounding and planning capabilities in CUAs, and GroundCUA, a large-scale grounding dataset with 56K annotated screenshots and over 3.6 million UI element annotations. Preliminary evaluation reveals that current foundation action models struggle substantially with professional desktop applications (~60% task failure rate). Beyond evaluation, CUA-Suite's rich multimodal corpus supports emerging research directions including generalist screen parsing, continuous spatial control, video-based reward modeling, and visual world models. All data and models are publicly released.
2603.24440.paper_summary_zh: 電腦使用代理（CUAs）在自動化複雜的桌面工作流程方面具有巨大的潛力，但通用代理的進展受到持續高質量人類示範視頻稀缺的瓶頸限制。最近的研究強調，持續視頻而非稀疏的截圖是擴展這些代理所需的關鍵缺失成分。然而，現有最大的開放數據集ScaleCUA僅包含200萬張截圖，相當於不到20小時的視頻。為了解決這一瓶頸，我們推出了CUA-Suite，一個專業桌面電腦使用代理的專家視頻示範和密集註釋的大規模生態系統。其核心是VideoCUA，提供約10,000個人類示範的任務，涵蓋87個不同的應用程序，並配有持續的30 fps屏幕錄像、運動光標軌跡和多層推理註釋，總計約55小時和600萬幀的專家視頻。與僅捕捉最終點擊坐標的稀疏數據集不同，這些持續視頻流保留了人類互動的完整時間動態，形成了一個可以無損轉換為現有代理框架所需格式的信息超集。CUA-Suite還提供兩個互補資源：UI-Vision，一個嚴謹的基準，用於評估CUAs的基礎和規劃能力，以及GroundCUA，一個大型基礎數據集，包含56K註釋截圖和超過360萬個UI元素註釋。初步評估顯示，當前的基礎行動模型在專業桌面應用程序中面臨著相當大的挑戰（約60%的任務失敗率）。除了評估，CUA-Suite的豐富多模態語料庫支持新興的研究方向，包括通用屏幕解析、持續空間控制、基於視頻的獎勵建模和視覺世界模型。所有數據和模型均已公開發布。
2603.24440.author: Xiangru Jian et.al.
2603.24440.authors: Xiangru Jian, Shravan Nayak, Kevin Qinghong Lin, Aarash Feizi, Kaixin Li, Patrice Bechard, Spandana Gella, Sai Rajeswar
